placeholder.name: Name
placeholder.objectId: e.g. system.adapter.admin.0 or system.adapter.* (if empty, msg.topic is used)

info.enumAssignmentDescription: Each returned object gets an enumAssignments property containing:
enumAssignmentList: rooms - Array of assigned room enums
functions - Array of assigned function enums
other - Array of other enum assignments
totalEnums - Total number of enum assignments
info.enumNote: Note: This feature requires additional queries and may increase response time.

help.title: ioBroker Object Retrieval
help.description: ioBroker object retrieval via WebSocket with wildcard pattern support and optional enum assignments.
help.singleObject: Single Object: Retrieve one specific object by ID
help.wildcardPattern: Wildcard Pattern: Retrieve multiple objects matching a pattern (auto-detected when * is present)
help.objectIdDescription: The ioBroker object identifier or wildcard pattern. If empty, msg.topic is used as the object ID.
help.outputPropertyDescription: The message property to store the object data (default: payload).
help.objectTypeDescription: Filter objects by type (state, channel, device, etc.). Leave empty to include all types.
help.includeEnumsDescription: Automatically adds enum assignment information to each object.
help.enumTypesDescription: Filter which enum types to include (all, rooms only, functions only, etc.).
